  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Hotel Manager",
  "description": "Welcome to Teestone Hotel &amp; Apartments, a modern boutique hotel located in the peaceful neighborhood of Ikeja and only 15 minutes from Muritala Muhammed International Airport.&nbsp;For travelers searching for hotels in Ikeja, Teestone offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and contemporary hospitality. Whether you are visiting Lagos for business, attending meetings in Ikeja, catching an early flight, or simply planning a relaxing staycation, our hotel provides a stylish and welcoming environment designed to make your stay memorable.

Unlike many traditional hotels near Lagos airport, Teestone Hotel &amp; Apartments provides guests with a quieter and more relaxing setting away from the heavy airport traffic while still maintaining quick and easy access to the airport and major commercial areas of Ikeja.&nbsp;Our thoughtfully designed rooms, rooftop bar, suspended swimming pool, and personalized guest experience make Teestone one of the most comfortable places to stay for visitors looking for quality accommodation in Ikeja.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Hotel Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos

Job Summary


	Support the Hotel Manager in overseeing daily operations, ensuring exceptional guest experiences, and driving efficiency across departments.


Responsibilities
Operations &amp; Guest Service:


	Assist in managing front desk, housekeeping, and F&amp;B operations.
	Handle guest inquiries, complaints, and requests promptly, ensuring high satisfaction.
	Oversee room assignments, check-in/check-out processes, and coordinate with departments.


Administration &amp; Compliance:


	Support budgeting, monitor expenses, and track occupancy reports.
	Ensure compliance with hotel policies, safety standards, and local regulations.
	Manage staff schedules, performance evaluations, and training coordination.


Marketing &amp; Sales:


	Assist in promoting hotel services, packages, and events.
	Collaborate with marketing team on guest engagement and feedback initiatives.


Problem Solving &amp; Leadership:


	Handle operational issues, escalate critical matters to the Hotel Manager.
	Lead a team, foster a positive work environment, and drive service excellence.


Requirements


	Qualifications: HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Hospitality Management or related field.
	Experience: 2+ years in hotel management or a similar supervisory role.


Skills:


	Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficient in hotel management software (e.g., PMS).
	Fluent in English, additional languages a plus.
	Personal Traits: Customer-focused, adaptable, and detail-oriented.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;teestonejobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Assistant Hotel Manager Job at Teestone Hotel & Apartments




        
    

        
        Welcome to Teestone Hotel & Apartments, a modern boutique hotel located in the peaceful neighborhood of Ikeja and only 15 minutes from Muritala Muhammed International Airport. For travelers searching for hotels in Ikeja, Teestone offers the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and contemporary hospitality. Whether you are visiting Lagos for business, attending meetings in Ikeja, catching an early flight, or simply planning a relaxing staycation, our hotel provides a stylish and welcoming environment designed to make your stay memorable.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Unlike many traditional hotels near Lagos airport, Teestone Hotel & Apartments provides guests with a quieter and more relaxing setting away from the heavy airport traffic while still maintaining quick and easy access to the airport and major commercial areas of Ikeja. Our thoughtfully designed rooms, rooftop bar, suspended swimming pool, and personalized guest experience make Teestone one of the most comfortable places to stay for visitors looking for quality accommodation in Ikeja.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Hotel Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos

Job Summary


	Support the Hotel Manager in overseeing daily operations, ensuring exceptional guest experiences, and driving efficiency across departments.


Responsibilities
Operations & Guest Service:


	Assist in managing front desk, housekeeping, and F&B operations.
	Handle guest inquiries, complaints, and requests promptly, ensuring high satisfaction.
	Oversee room assignments, check-in/check-out processes, and coordinate with departments.


Administration & Compliance:


	Support budgeting, monitor expenses, and track occupancy reports.
	Ensure compliance with hotel policies, safety standards, and local regulations.
	Manage staff schedules, performance evaluations, and training coordination.


Marketing & Sales:


	Assist in promoting hotel services, packages, and events.
	Collaborate with marketing team on guest engagement and feedback initiatives.


Problem Solving & Leadership:


	Handle operational issues, escalate critical matters to the Hotel Manager.
	Lead a team, foster a positive work environment, and drive service excellence.


Requirements


	Qualifications: HND/Bachelor’s Degree in Hospitality Management or related field.
	Experience: 2+ years in hotel management or a similar supervisory role.


Skills:


	Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficient in hotel management software (e.g., PMS).
	Fluent in English, additional languages a plus.
	Personal Traits: Customer-focused, adaptable, and detail-oriented.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
